task: Advanced high-value task: Ontology Mapping Candidate Safety Threshold Evidence. Scenario: a senior technical lead needs to decide whether to hold, release, retest, or redesign based only on supplied evidence for ontology mapping candidate. Embedded packet: Records: R1 confidence_pct=81 type_compatible=122 cardinality_risk=2; R2 confidence_pct=90 type_compatible=118 cardinality_risk=5; R3 confidence_pct=76 type_compatible=133 cardinality_risk=1. Remediation options: O1 changes confidence_pct by -12% cost=96500; O2 changes type_compatible by -18% cost=109300; O3 changes cardinality_risk by -25% cost=66700; max_budget=135600. Rules and constraints: accept confidence>=85 and type compatible; 65-84 requires curator review; missing values cannot be imputed and all calculations must use only the embedded packet. Required work: evaluate whether the supplied remediation options are relevant, affordable, and sufficient to change the final decision. Deliver ontology_mapping_3.xlsx + expert_memo.md with formulas, intermediate values, row-level citations, explicit assumptions, sensitivity checks, and a final recommendation table. Do not invent inputs; mark ambiguous items as needs_review.
